message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

class SodaMachine {
  +SodaPrice : byte <<get>>
  --
  +SodaMachine(display:IDisplay, billAcceptor:IBillAcceptor, sodaDispenser:ISodaDispenser, controlPanel:IControlPanel, sodaPrice:byte)
  +PrintClientBalance() : void
  +PrintSodaPrice() : void
  +PrintSizeOfSodaPour() : void
  +PrintAvailableSodaVolume() : void
}

class ISodaDispenser
class IBillAcceptor
class IControlPanel

SodaMachine --> ISodaDispenser : SodaDispenser
SodaMachine --> IBillAcceptor : BillAcceptor
SodaMachine --> IControlPanel : ControlPanel
@enduml
